registration.q: Can I vote if I don't have a Voter ID?
registration.a: Yes, if your name is in the Electoral Roll, you can use Aadhaar, PAN, Passport, etc.

registration.q: How do I check my name in the list?
registration.a: Visit voters.eci.gov.in or use the Voter Helpline App.

election_day.a: It's a printer-like device that shows a slip for 7 seconds to verify your vote.

election_day.q: Can I use my mobile inside the booth?
election_day.a: No, mobile phones are strictly prohibited inside the polling station.
